notes: Gamma B25 with h2_hold_request=1 + SSE envelope: **HOLD=1 BLOCKS EVERYTHING including outline**. (1) h2_hold_request=1 intercepts the outline generation request BEFORE server responds — so outline generation itself fails with 'Failed to fetch'. (2) Only 1 empty card generated (no title, no bullet points). (3) render-generation endpoint also got ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED 200 (OK) — connection closed after 200 but SSE delivery failed. (4) COMPARISON: Previous #300 (h2_hold_request=0, JSON 400) was the BEST Gamma result — outline succeeded, render-gen got clean 400 with warning text in JSON. #303 (SSE) was worse. #304 (hold=1) is WORST — blocks everything. (5) CONCLUSION: For Gamma, h2_hold_request=0 with HTTP 400 JSON response (#300 approach) is the correct strategy. Hold=1 is too aggressive — it blocks the outline endpoint too, which prevents the normal flow from starting. The warning should only intercept render-generation, not outline.
